nasb.text: Every ravine will be filled, And every mountain and hill will be brought low; The crooked will become straight, And the rough roads smooth;

esv.text: Every valley shall be filled, and every mountain and hill shall be made low, and the crooked shall become straight, and the rough places shall become level ways,

cnv.text: 一切窪谷都當填滿， 大小山岡都要削平！ 彎彎曲曲的改為正直， 高高低低的修成平坦！

ccb.text: 一切山谷将被填满， 大山小丘将被削平， 弯曲的道路要被修直， 崎岖的路径要被铺平。

csbs.text: 一切山谷将被填满， 山岭小丘将被削平； 扭曲的道将要修直， 崎岖的路将要铺平。
